title: FurryCraft Client
body:
Have you ever wanted to just floof around and play Minecraft?

Well here's my solution; I introduce to you, _FurryCraft_—**Minecraft Certifiably Pawsome!**
![FurryCraft Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6838dc2ab7695c5baa2e0cfa21f08ad71d86af4f.png)
It adds many optimization improvements to your game, along with useful features, ~~and of course fluffy wuffy menu screens~~. 

**So enjoy floofin' round with _FurryCraft_.** ^>w<^

Expect possible future updates to this modpack over time.
